actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: You've already planted the seeds of that idea in his mind.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You've already buried the seeds of that idea in his mind; now you just have to nourish them.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: I had an idea last night that I would like to develop.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: I had an idea last night that I would like to develop.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Plato's theory of ideas were the seeds that grew into logicians flowering.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Plato's theory of ideas provided the seeds that flowered into logic.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Let that thought take root in your mind.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The best idea might take root in your mind, but you still have to tend it for it to grow.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes even the most lovingly tended ideas fail to bear fruit.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: I'm a strong believer in branching out.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: I'm a strong believer in branching out.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The best ideas send up saplings of truth that sometimes grow in unexpected directions.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: If you give it plenty of thought, it'll grow.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If you nourish an idea with plenty of thought, it will usually grow.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: That idea was planted far too late.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: It was the right idea, but planted in the wrong season for it to flourish.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: He pulled up the wrong ideas by their roots.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The most harmful ideas can only be eliminated by pulling them up at their roots.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Spread the seeds of your idea.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Spread the seeds of your idea; it is for others to provide the water and soil.
